task_completion.description: Navigate to the Chlorine inventory at Riverside Water Reclamation Plant
task_completion.visual_evidence: CAMEO Data Manager window showing the 'Riverside Water Reclamation Plant' facility and the 'Chlorine' (CAS 7782-50-5) chemical inventory record selected or open.

task_completion.description: Enter the scenario name and type
task_completion.visual_evidence: A scenario form or window in CAMEO Data Manager showing the name 'Railcar Rupture - Worst Case' and the scenario type set to 'Worst Case'.
The scenario form showing Wind Speed 1.5 (m/s), Stability Class F, Release Duration 10 (minutes), Quantity Released 180,000 (pounds), and Distance to Endpoint 14.0 (miles).

task_completion.description: Initiate the export or print process for the scenario
task_completion.visual_evidence: A print preview, report generation, or export dialog box open in CAMEO Data Manager for the scenario details.

task_completion.description: Save the exported scenario details as a PDF to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the file name 'scenario_report.pdf' and the path 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\', or a file explorer window confirming the file's presence in the Documents folder.

integrity.description: Agent used the CAMEO Data Manager GUI to create the scenario and export the report
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the CAMEO Data Manager interface being actively used (mouse clicks, typing in fields) rather than command-line tools.

integrity.description: The PDF was created using the application's built-in print/export to PDF feature
integrity.visual_evidence: The print dialog shows 'Microsoft Print to PDF' or a similar PDF printer/exporter being used, rather than a terminal command creating the file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use PowerShell, Command Prompt, or Python scripts to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or code editors are used to generate the PDF or modify the CAMEO database directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: CAMEO Data Manager is a real emergency planning software. The task requires creating a scenario for 'Riverside Water Reclamation Plant' -> 'Chlorine' (CAS 7782-50-5). Scenario Name: 'Railcar Rupture - Worst Case'. Type: 'Worst Case'. Parameters: Wind Speed 1.5 m/s, Stability Class F, Release Duration 10 minutes, Quantity Released 180,000 pounds, Distance to Endpoint 14.0 miles. The final output must be exported to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\scenario_report.pdf using the software's print/export functionality.
